/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Couldn't resolve reference to ConnectionEnd 'attitude_window'.: AGREE annex references ports (sensored_attitude, reference_torque) that are not connected via TCP to ACF as implied by R1; connection Cnx1 exists but AGREE clauses incorrectly map sensored_attitude to reference_torque, which are not the connected endpoints. -> Remove the assume and guarantee clauses that incorrectly equate sensored_attitude with reference_torque and sun_direction with reference_force, since these ports are not connected by Cnx1/Cnx2; Cnx1 connects TCP.nominal_attitude to ACF.nominal_attitude, but these are not visible in AOCSprocessing type scope.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 108: Couldn't resolve reference to ConnectionEnd 'check_thresholds'.: ConnectionEnds 'attitude_window' and 'check_thresholds' do not exist as features of AOCSprocessing; validator correctly flags them as unresolved, and AGREE annex should not reference non-existent or implementation-subcomponent ports. -> Delete all assume/guarantee clauses in the AGREE annex, as they reference non-existent or implementation-scoped ports (TCP.*, ACF.*) not visible at the component type level and misrepresent the actual signal flow.

Couldn't resolve reference to ConnectionEnd 'attitude_window'.: ConnectionEnd 'attitude_window' not found in component TCP -> Remove or correct Cnx5 connection referencing non-existent 'attitude_window'
Couldn't resolve reference to ConnectionEnd 'check_thresholds'.: ConnectionEnd 'check_thresholds' not found in component TCP -> Remove or correct Cnx6 connection referencing non-existent 'check_thresholds'
